ModMetaData.name: Gene Color Designer
ModMetaData.author: nalroff
ModMetaData.description:
Gene Color Designer adds configurable germline skin-color genes for RimWorld 1.6. Pawns with these genes resolve a stable per-pawn skin color from an authored palette or HSV range, and newborns inherit a color sampled between their parents' actual skin colors.
The current implementation is skin-focused. In-game design support for configurable template genes is the next major feature.
